'''N'zaet Nir''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who is from [[Maryo|Mayro]] and a member of the [[Executive Directorship Board|Direx Board]], the executive committee of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he was one of six civilians taken hostage in the [[Galactic City spaceport hostage siege]] by [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] terrorists. They had rigged the other hostages with dummy explosives and forced Nir to swap clothes with one of the terrorists. When [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces stormed the room he was nearly misidentified and shot by a [[Clone commando/Legends|commando]], but was saved by the actions of [[Kal Skirata]], who had infiltrated the room earlier in the siege.

It became apparent afterward that the terrorists had intended that Nir be killed, thereby creating tension between the Republic and CSA, who were neutral in the conflict with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
